title: Fishing minigame
description: Interactive fishing minigame with depth system, special fish, auto-cook enchantment, rain bonuses, fishing journal and collectible Fishing Chest!
body:
🎣 Fishing Minigame

Transform boring vanilla fishing into an exciting interactive experience!

Cast your rod and dive into a beautiful underwater minigame. Control your hook with WASD, chase fish through the depths, and catch amazing treasures!

⭐ Key Features:

• Interactive Minigame - No more waiting! Actively hunt your catch
• Depth System - Dive deeper for better loot (x2 bonus in deep water!)
• Weather Bonuses - Rain gives x2 loot multiplier
• Auto-Cook - Luck of the Sea enchantment cooks fish automatically
• 4 Special Fish - Golden Carp, Golden Salmon, Angler Fish, Trout with unique potion effects
• Rare Treasures - Find Diamonds, Tridents, Heart of the Sea in deep water
• Fishing Chest - Auto-collects your loot, supports hoppers
• Big Chest - Place 2 chests together for 54 slots
• Fishing Journal - Track all your catches and stats

🎮 How to Play:
1. Cast your fishing rod into water
2. Minigame opens automatically
3. Use WASD to move your hook
4. Catch fish and treasures!
5. Type /fishinghelp for detailed guide

📦 Requirements:
• Minecraft 1.20.1
• Forge 47.0.0+

💬 Support: Discord - avenlz.

Enjoy fishing like never before!
